notes: This software update provides general improvements and compatibility updates. It includes the software content released in all previous updates.
Improvements to battery preconditioning, including the system now acting more dynamically
To start the preconditioning, a DC fast charger must be set as the destination
Improvements to the climate system, including a bug fix for sporadically blowing cold air
Audible confirmation when locking the vehicle is introduced
Rear auto brake for static objects during parking maneuvers is introduced
Bug fix for when the steering wheel heating didn't start in colder climates
